title: aporum thysanophorum
intro: Aporum thysanophorum, also known as the 'Mountain Club Moss', is a type of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Aporum thysanophorum are derived from its rhizomes and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. This plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antioxidant. Aporum thysanophorum is prepared using various herbal methods, including drying, grinding, and infusing the rhizomes and roots in hot water to create teas or tinctures.
